introduction:
Welcome to the Concrete Technology Lab, a virtual laboratory dedicated to the exploration of experiments related to concrete technology. Concrete is the most widely used construction material in the world due to its versatility, durability, and high compressive strength. It plays a vital role in the development of infrastructure such as buildings, bridges, roads, and other civil engineering structures. Understanding the behavior and properties of concrete and its constituent materials—cement, fine aggregates, coarse aggregates, and water—is essential for ensuring the safety, strength, and longevity of structures.
In this virtual laboratory, we invite you to dive into the fascinating realm of concrete technology—an essential component of modern construction practices.

experiments.name: To determine the compressive strength of standard cement mortar cubes
To determine the tensile strength of standard cement mortar briquettes
To determine the heat of hydration of a given sample of cement
To determine the chemical composition of a given sample of cement
To determine the soundness of the given sample of cement
To determine the soundness of the fine and coarse aggregate
To determine bulking of a given sample of fine aggregate
To determine the flakiness index of the coarse aggregate
To determine the elongation index of the coarse aggregate
To determine the angularity number of coarse aggregate

objective:
The objectives of the Concrete Technology Lab are:
  • To recall the fundamental concepts of concrete technology and material behavior.
  • To understand the theoretical background underlying various experimental procedures.
  • To apply learned concepts in performing standard laboratory experiments on concrete and its constituents.
  • To analyze, interpret, and present the results obtained from experiments.

courseAlignment.description: These experiments are part of the concrete technology as per AICTE curriculum taught across the universities and polytechnic institutions throughout India, including (but not limited to):
universities: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham University, Tamil Nadu
